meta.summary: PanDepth ultrafast coverage and depth calculation for SAM/BAM/CRAM/PAF alignments.
meta.description: PanDepth ultrafast coverage and depth calculation for SAM/BAM/CRAM/PAF alignments.

test: pandepth -h 2>&1 | grep -F 'show this help [v2.26]' >/dev/null && pandepth 2>&1 | grep -F 'Usage: pandepth' >/dev/null && ldd $(command -v pandepth) | grep -F 'libhts.so.3' >/dev/null && ldd $(command -v pandepth) | grep -F 'libdeflate.so.0' >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-pandepth-chr && cd /tmp/taf-pandepth-chr && printf '@HD	VN:1.6	SO:unsorted
@SQ	SN:chr1	LN:100
r1	0	chr1	11	60	10M	*	0	0	ACGTACGTAA	FFFFFFFFFF
' > toy.sam && pandepth -i toy.sam -o toy -t 1 -a >/tmp/taf-pandepth-chr.log 2>&1 && test -s toy.chr.stat.gz && test -s toy.SiteDepth.gz && gzip -cd toy.chr.stat.gz | grep -F 'chr1' >/dev/null && gzip -cd toy.chr.stat.gz | grep -F '10.00' >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-pandepth-targets && cd /tmp/taf-pandepth-targets && printf '@HD	VN:1.6	SO:unsorted
@SQ	SN:chr1	LN:100
r1	0	chr1	11	60	10M	*	0	0	ACGTACGTAA	FFFFFFFFFF
' > toy.sam && printf 'chr1	10	20
' > toy.bed && pandepth -i toy.sam -b toy.bed -o bed -t 1 >/tmp/taf-pandepth-bed.log 2>&1 && test -s bed.bed.stat.gz && gzip -cd bed.bed.stat.gz | grep -F 'chr1_10_20' >/dev/null && pandepth -i toy.sam -w 25 -o win -t 1 >/tmp/taf-pandepth-win.log 2>&1 && test -s win.win.stat.gz && gzip -cd win.win.stat.gz | grep -F '40.00' >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-pandepth-gene-gc && cd /tmp/taf-pandepth-gene-gc && printf '@HD	VN:1.6	SO:unsorted
@SQ	SN:chr1	LN:100
r1	0	chr1	11	60	10M	*	0	0	ACGTACGTAA	FFFFFFFFFF
' > toy.sam && printf 'toy.sam
' > input.list && printf 'chr1	smoke	CDS	11	20	.	+	0	ID=cds1;Parent=gene1
' > toy.gff && printf '>chr1
ACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGT
' > ref.fa && pandepth -i input.list -g toy.gff -o gene -t 1 >/tmp/taf-pandepth-gene.log 2>&1 && test -s gene.gene.stat.gz && gzip -cd gene.gene.stat.gz | grep -F 'gene1' >/dev/null && pandepth -i toy.sam -o gc -t 1 -r ref.fa -c >/tmp/taf-pandepth-gc.log 2>&1 && test -s gc.chr.stat.gz && gzip -cd gc.chr.stat.gz | grep -F 'GC(%)' >/dev/null

upstream.name: PanDepth
upstream.citation: Yu et al. 2024, Briefings in Bioinformatics
